headline: Walmart Opens Next Generation Supercenter in The Villages, Highlights Florida-Grown Products
summary: THE VILLAGES, Fla., March 04, 2026--Today, Walmart’s newest Supercenter at 11115 Waxman Drive officially opened in The Villages with a community celebration highlighting the store’s associates, new products and services, Fresh From Florida produce, and local nonprofit partners.

headline: Is Walmart Inc. (WMT) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: We came across a bullish thesis on Walmart Inc. on Quality Value Investing’s Substack by David J. Waldron. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on WMT. Walmart Inc.’s share was trading at $127.91 as of March 3rd. WMT’s trailing and forward P/E were 46.85 and 43.10 respectively according to Yahoo Finance. Walmart Inc. (NASDAQ: WMT) remains a compelling holding in the consumer staples sector, distinguished by its scale, operational discipline, and strong brand. […]

headline: Target Stock Continues To Disappoint
summary: Although Target’s (NYSE: TGT) stock recently rallied, it remains a horrible long-term investment. The stock is flat over the last year, while the S&P is up 16%. headline: Exclusive-Walmart-backed PhonePe targets up to $10.5 billion valuation in India IPO, sources say
summary: Walmart-backed Indian fintech firm PhonePe, the country's most used payments platform, is aiming to list at a valuation of between $9 billion and $10.5 billion, two people with direct knowledge ‌of the matter said.  That suggests the IPO will raise about $900 million to $1.05 billion.  Walmart will trim ​its stake in PhonePe by about 12% in the firm's initial public offering, while Tiger Global and Microsoft plan to exit their stakes, according to the firm's IPO filing.

headline: Walmart Settlement Raises Questions On Gig Driver Costs And Investor Outlook
summary: Walmart, ticker NasdaqGS:WMT, agreed to a US$100 million settlement with the FTC and 11 states over Spark Driver payment practices. Regulators alleged that Walmart misled some gig drivers about their pay and certain fees tied to deliveries. The agreement requires Walmart to adopt new transparency measures, including clearer earnings disclosures and an earnings verification program for Spark drivers. Walmart will be subject to long term regulatory oversight related to these practices as part...
